name: Stale content
about: Flag a module that needs updating because the underlying technology has changed
title: "[STALE] Module X.Y — what changed"
labels: stale
assignees: ''
---

## What has changed?

<!-- Describe the change in the underlying technology, API, or best practice. -->

**Module:** <!-- e.g. 3.2 — MCP Tool Calling -->
**What changed:** <!-- e.g. "The MCP spec updated tool_call format in v0.9 — examples in Layer 2 use the old format" -->

## When did it change?

**Approx. date:** <!-- e.g. January 2026 -->
**Source:** <!-- Link to release notes, changelog, or announcement -->

## What needs updating?

<!-- Be specific: which section, which code example, which claim is now wrong. -->

- [ ] Layer 1 explanation
- [ ] Layer 2 code example
- [ ] Layer 3 primary source citation
- [ ] Production Gotcha
- [ ] Other:

## Can you help update it?
